description: A large abstract painting on a white background featuring loose, gestural brushstrokes and splashes of color. The composition is dominated by soft pastel tones — pink, pale yellow, lavender, light green, blue, and touches of magenta — applied with energetic, rapid brushwork. Faint black linear marks suggest possible figural outlines, but the forms remain largely abstract and dissolved. The paint is applied thinly in most areas, with the white ground visible throughout, creating an airy, open feeling.
